purpose: Seed public people with Wikidata GitHub username property P2037.
promotion_rule: Promote to Silver if GitHub profile resolves and identity evidence is not contradictory.

purpose: Fetch public GitHub profile data for a seeded login.
promotion_rule: Use only public fields; ignore private fields; require identity match before attaching to person.

purpose: Fetch public repos for ranking top artifacts.
promotion_rule: Rank by ownership, stars, recency, repo relevance, and topic alignment.

purpose: Resolve academic author footprint by display name.
promotion_rule: Promote only if name + institution/public profile context match.

purpose: Fetch works for resolved OpenAlex author.
promotion_rule: Use top works for academic footprint; do not over-credit similarly named authors.

purpose: Validate public ORCID record if ORCID iD is known.

promotion_rule: Promote only if disambiguation context supports match.

query_or_endpoint: PatentsView API/table search by inventor name and assignee context
promotion_rule: Use only with strong name + assignee/context evidence.

query_or_endpoint: Common Crawl CDX API for known official domains only
promotion_rule: Supplemental; never sole basis for identity merge.
